privileged_info_summary: Victoria Day is a Canadian statutory holiday observed on the Monday preceding May 25. In 2026, Victoria Day occurs on Monday, May 18. The task operates on a Docker-based OSCAR EMR (Electronic Medical Record) environment containing synthetic test data. The credentials used are test/demo accounts configured in the OSCAR installation: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117'. The task requires adding this public holiday to the OSCAR database using the administrator interface.
